dashboard.title: Allstat
dashboard.subtitle: Access official statistics, regional data, and comprehensive reports from the Sensus Ekonomi 2026 guidelines.
dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by topic, keyword, or catalog ID...
dashboard.searchHelper: Ready to search now? Find your desired documents instantly in our fast repository.

publications.title: Publication
publications.description: Access digital versions of official statistical yearbooks, technical guidance booklets, and regional economic summaries.

tables.title: Table
tables.description: Query dynamic data grids on provincial consumer price indexes, labor indicators, and Sensus Ekonomi sebaran unit target.

news.title: Official Statistic News
news.description: Stay updated with the latest press briefs, quarterly inflation indices, structural PDRB news, and BRS files.

search.title: Search Results
search.subtitle: Find your desired documents instantly across our statistics repository.
search.noResultsHint: Try a different keyword, or start the guided tour to explore what's available.

welcome.title: Welcome to Allstat Search!
welcome.description: Welcome to the official Sensus Ekonomi 2026 (SE2026) Portal. This portal aggregates official statistical files, provincial data streams, and economic monographs. Let us take a quick 1-minute tour to explore the primary tools available at your fingertips.

metrics.title: Core Statistical Metrics
metrics.description: On the dashboard, you can view major national indicators at a glance. Find real-time values for Inflation Rates, Open Unemployment (TPT) Sakernas update, target Registered Businesses, and Labor Participation.

tables.title: Browse Dynamic Tables
tables.description: Need to slice and analyze data? Under this section, you can filter multiple datasets by province, sort any grid column instantly, and explore a fully interactive customized SVG trend line/bar visualizer with tooltip support.

publications.title: Digital Publications Index
publications.description: Access high-quality digital monographs, regional yearbooks, and official survey catalogs. Search by title or description, look at responsive monograph tag chips, and download official booklets instantly.

news.title: Official Releases Feed
news.description: Read Berita Resmi Statistik (BRS) directly from the office. This section features interactive press releases with responsive miniature indicators, summaries, and complete official transcripts.

publications.title: Publications Index
publications.subtitle: Explore books, booklets, census logs, and analytical summaries.
publications.searchPlaceholder: Search publications by title, catalog ID, or keywords...
publications.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your category, selecting a different release year, or clearing some keyword parameters.

tables.title: Dynamic Data Tables
tables.subtitle: Filter, sort, and visualize key BPS indicators down to the provincial plane.
tables.provinceFilterHint: Check provinces to visualize and slice data:
tables.toastCopied: Table copied to clipboard in CSV format!
tables.toastExported: Simulating Excel XLS file compile... Complete! Download started.
tables.noRegionsMatch: No regions match the filter guidelines. Check some provinces on the sidebar!

news.title: Statistical Releases & News
news.subtitle: Read official announcements, BRS folders, and spatial analyses directly from the head office.
news.panelSubtitle: Explore hot press releases, quarterly announcements, and census dissemination updates.
news.exploreHint: Select any press item from the feed on the left to read and analyze data indices.
